prose:
The frontier orbitals calculation on furan was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase. The calculation converged within 9 SCF cycles.

The HOMO energy is approximately -6.36 eV, the LUMO energy is approximately -0.10 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of about 6.257 eV. The result was obtained with the program PySCF, employing the specified level of theory and geometry.

The detailed method used: B3LYP/def2-TZVP in gas phase, tier 'standard'. The SCF converged successfully, and all energy values are finite and trustworthy.
